label: namecode - AURORA | 04.618
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by Auroras from Space. What do auroras look like from above? Behold!  From the ground, auroras dance high above clouds, frequently causing spectacular displays.  From space, they look a bit different. As the International Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
